From food and confectionery to electricals and personal care — if your product deserves premium packaging, we've made it before.

The Process

From idea to box in four simple steps.

01

Share your idea

WhatsApp us anything — a reference image, a Pinterest link, or just a voice note. No brief needed. No jargon. We take it from there.

Takes 2 minutes
02

We engineer your prototype

Our team builds the keyline, structure and opening mechanism. A real physical prototype is couriered to you within 3 days.

3 days. Guaranteed.
03

You hold it and decide

Feel the weight. Open the mechanism. Check the finish. Love it, tweak it, or we rebuild it. You decide when it's right.

Your call entirely
04

Production begins

Once approved, our CDC Printers facility moves to production. From 200 to 20,000 boxes — same obsessive care, every run.

From 200 boxes
Start your box journey

About Boxsmith

Built on legacy. Built for founders.

Boxsmith is the D2C packaging arm of CDC Printers — a Kolkata institution with over two decades of manufacturing excellence and 11 national awards.

We built Boxsmith because premium packaging was gatekept behind massive minimum orders and opaque processes. Growing brands deserved better. Premium boxes from 200 units, prototyped in 3 days, with the full weight of an award-winning facility behind every order.

Your vision. Our two decades of craft. Delivered in 3 days.
Shreya Choudhury
Founder, Boxsmith  ·  Director, CDC Printers
